Silver key, or Skey, is a stat that make you get white energy for the Posse when you spend Aritmerica, or use some cards or wheel effect.
So, if you have 25 Skey on a character and you use a 3 cost card of him you will get 25x3 Skey energy on the circle bar for the posse.

The more expensive the cards you use, the more silver keys u get

Once u have enough silver keys, u can activate a special ultimate called the Posse (you get a new one every chapter you finish). You can use the posse in any team u like (unlike exalts which are limited to a character)
